name: Gary Peters
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,386,784 for Gary Peters in U.S. Senate, MI. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $3,386,784.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance classification updates.
